Nice to meet you

My background in architecture gave me a systems lens, how things connect, where they break, and how to build them to last. That's still how I design.

Most recently at Meta, working on some of the hardest problems in social media: feed controls, design systems, teen safety, privacy at scale.

I'm the designer you bring in for the hard problems. I like complex. I like cross-functional. I care deeply about craft, about the people I build with, and about making things that work for all users.

Based in
New York City
Domain expertise
Consumer product · Design systems · Trust & safety · Settings & controls · Youth design
Previously
Meta · Google · Dolby · Startups
Background
M. Landscape Architecture, UPenn · B. Architecture, USC
Listening to
Off the clock
Reality TV · Pop culture · Urban Walks · Music festivals · Community making · Mentoring
